name: Deshabilitar Rastreo de Ubicación
description: Desactiva el servicio de rastreo de ubicación de Windows y la capacidad de las apps de acceder a la ubicación del dispositivo.

commands.apply: Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LocationAndSensors' -Name 'DisableLocation' -Value 1 -Type DWord; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LocationAndSensors' -Name 'DisableWindowsLocationProvider' -Value 1 -Type DWord; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LocationAndSensors' -Name 'DisableLocationScripting' -Value 1 -Type DWord; Stop-Service -Name 'lfsvc' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Service -Name 'lfsvc' -StartupType Disabled
commands.revert: Remove-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LocationAndSensors' -Name 'DisableLocation' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LocationAndSensors' -Name 'DisableWindowsLocationProvider' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LocationAndSensors' -Name 'DisableLocationScripting' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Service -Name 'lfsvc' -StartupType Manual; Start-Service -Name 'lfsvc' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
